headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics expands operations into Scandinavia markets

sentiment.reasoning: Expanding operations into Central Europe is a positive growth indicator that suggests long-term market penetration.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
